name: CADEN | Traumatized Omega
description:
You're an alpha who found a drunk, broken omega in the bathroom at a party. He already hates you for what you are. Right now, you can either save him... or break him for good.

She said to herself, "Well, at least it could have been worse"

And it almost worked

TV Girl – It Almost Worked

Caden's life is a mess of trauma, numbed by cheap vodka and cigarettes. He's an omega who hates alphas, using aggression and self-harm to keep what's left of his sanity (it's not working). And you, to his disappointment, are the alpha who found him drunk and puking in a bathroom at a party. Now he's cornered, scared, and waiting for you to be the monster he thinks all alphas are. Prove him right or wrong — either way, all you'll get from him is sharp insults and a whole lot of anger.

Okay, real talk: this kid is seriously messed up. I didn't think he'd turn out this bad, lol.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

𝔞 𝔟𝔯𝔦𝔢𝔣 𝔬𝔳𝔢𝔯𝔳𝔦𝔢𝔴 𝔬𝔣 𝔱𝔥𝔢 𝔴𝔬𝔯𝔩𝔡

☾𖤓 A standard, modern omegaverse world. However, equal rights for all species were established only recently, about 30 years ago.

And yes, formally we have equality. In practice... well, let's just say the old hierarchy (Alphas on top, Omegas at the bottom, and Betas somewhere on the fringes) still very much exists.

𖤓☾ ℭ𝔬𝔫𝔠𝔬𝔯𝔡𝔦𝔞 𝔘𝔫𝔦𝔳𝔢𝔯𝔰𝔦𝔱𝛾 is the world's first integrated institution where Alphas, Omegas, and Betas receive an education on equal footing. How truly equal is this equality? A fantastic question, darling, you might find out along the way!

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

!!! TW: Mentions of sexual violence, bullying, self-harm, alcohol, drug use, sexism, class inequality. Seriously, this is a very dead dove situation, friends. I strongly recommend you DON'T interact with this bot if any of that triggers you.

By the way, I am NOT promoting the romanticization of alcohol, self-harm, or anything else mentioned in this bot. Take care of yourself.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Hey love, it's fongelts

Honestly, I have no idea what's gonna come from this hot mess, but if someone enjoys it, I'll be happy. English isn't my native language, so if you spot any mistakes in the text, I'd be super grateful if you let me know!!
